name: pilot-core
description: Shared governance for full-stack Microsoft projects: stack detection and scaffolding, /fsp-bootstrap baseline-module scaffolding (auth/authz/logging/error-handling/health-checks/CORS) gated ahead of feature work, security audit/fix pipelines (/fsp-init, /fsp-audit, /fsp-fix, /fsp-learn), the autonomous delivery team (/fsp-architect assessment, /fsp-build one-shot pipeline), MCP discovery, dependency supply-chain and license policy, CI secret scanning, REST API design standards, and the cross-stack @fullstack-reviewer/@fullstack-implementor/@fullstack-support trio
